projects.name: API Gateway Core
projects.description: Central ingress controller that routes external HTTP requests to internal services, handles TLS termination, and enforces global middleware

entries.description: Redis cluster for rate-limit counters and request-id deduplication
Service identifier for telemetry spans and log correlation
Service name emitted in OpenTelemetry resource attributes and Datadog APM traces
Enables distributed tracing export to the OTLP collector
Enables Prometheus-compatible metrics export via /metrics endpoint
Includes .NET runtime metrics (GC, thread pool, memory) in the metrics export
Azure Service Bus connection string for publishing gateway audit and security events
Number of Service Bus delivery attempts before an audit event is dead-lettered
Initial back-off delay in milliseconds between Service Bus retry attempts
Azure Blob Storage connection for archiving gateway access logs for compliance and audit purposes
Identity/Auth Service base URL for validating inbound JWT tokens on every proxied request
API key used by the gateway when calling the Identity Service token-introspection endpoint
Log level for the ASP.NET Core routing layer — useful for diagnosing upstream route mismatches
Log level for host startup and shutdown lifecycle messages
Enables structured per-request access logging including upstream latency and status codes
Enables per-upstream circuit breaker that trips after a configurable threshold of 5xx responses
Comma-separated list of origins permitted to make cross-origin requests through the API gateway

projects.name: Service Discovery
projects.description: Service registry that maintains the live catalogue of deployed service instances and exposes DNS-based and HTTP-based discovery APIs

entries.description: Expected heartbeat interval from registered services

projects.name: Config Distribution Service
projects.description: Distributes resolved configuration snapshots to client applications via SSE streams and REST polling

entries.description: Maximum concurrent SSE subscribers per project

projects.name: Secret Manager
projects.description: Centralised vault for storing, rotating, and auditing application secrets with envelope encryption and fine-grained access policies

entries.description: AWS KMS key ARN for envelope encryption of stored secrets

projects.name: Feature Flags Service
projects.description: Manages feature toggles with per-environment, per-tenant, and canary targeting rules; serves flag evaluations via REST and SSE

projects.name: Telemetry Collector
projects.description: Receives OpenTelemetry traces, metrics, and logs from all services; fans out to Jaeger, Prometheus, and the central log store

entries.description: ClickHouse connection for storing raw telemetry data
Maximum span batch size before forced flush

projects.name: Log Aggregator
projects.description: Collects structured log streams from Fluent Bit forwarders, enriches with context, and ingests into Elasticsearch or OpenSearch

entries.description: Number of days to retain raw log documents

projects.name: Health Monitor
projects.description: Continuously probes registered service endpoints for liveness and readiness; exposes a unified health dashboard and triggers alerts on degradation

entries.description: Interval between consecutive health probes per endpoint

projects.name: Event Bus
projects.description: Internal publish-subscribe backbone built on RabbitMQ; provides topic-based routing, dead-letter queues, and at-least-once delivery guarantees

entries.description: Maximum messages allowed in a queue before back-pressure is applied

projects.name: Circuit Breaker Service
projects.description: Tracks error rates per downstream dependency and opens circuit breakers to prevent cascading failures across the service mesh

entries.description: Error rate percentage that trips the circuit breaker

projects.name: Distributed Tracing Service
projects.description: Stores and queries distributed traces from Jaeger-compatible collectors; provides trace search, latency percentiles, and dependency maps

entries.description: Apache Cassandra connection for trace storage
Retention period for trace data in hours

projects.name: Artifact Registry
projects.description: Manages versioned build artifacts including Docker images, NuGet packages, npm packages, and wheel files with content-addressed storage

entries.description: S3-compatible bucket for artifact blob storage

projects.name: Deployment Coordinator
projects.description: Orchestrates rolling deployments across Kubernetes clusters; coordinates with CI/CD pipelines, respects change-freeze windows, and tracks deployment state

projects.name: Service Mesh Controller
projects.description: Manages Istio/Linkerd control-plane configuration: traffic policies, mTLS certificates, retries, timeouts, and traffic mirroring rules

entries.description: Whether mutual TLS is enforced for all inter-service traffic

projects.name: Configuration Drift Detector
projects.description: Periodically audits running service configurations against their approved snapshots and raises alerts when unmanaged drift is detected

entries.description: How often to scan all registered services for drift

projects.name: Internal Developer Platform
projects.description: Self-service portal for developers to provision environments, manage service ownership, view runbooks, and track infrastructure costs

entries.description: Allow teams to self-provision sandbox environments

projects.name: Build Orchestrator
projects.description: Triggers, queues, and monitors CI build jobs across GitHub Actions and internal runners; surfaces build status and artifacts

entries.description: GitHub App token for triggering workflows

projects.name: Deployment Manager
projects.description: Manages the full deployment lifecycle including environment promotion, approval gates, and rollback triggers across all service teams

entries.description: Minimum number of approvals required before a production deployment proceeds

projects.name: Pipeline Runner
projects.description: Executes CI/CD pipeline steps in isolated containers; reports step progress, logs, and exit codes back to the Build Orchestrator

entries.description: Default Docker image used for pipeline step containers

projects.name: Artifact Store
projects.description: Persists and serves build artifacts (binaries, test reports, coverage files) with content hashing and signed download URLs

entries.description: S3 bucket for artifact binary storage

projects.name: Rollback Manager
projects.description: Automates rollback procedures by detecting production anomalies and reverting deployments to the last known good snapshot

entries.description: HTTP 5xx error rate (%) that triggers automatic rollback

projects.name: Blue-Green Deployer
projects.description: Executes blue-green deployments by spinning up a green environment in parallel, running smoke tests, and switching traffic atomically

entries.description: Maximum time to wait for smoke tests to pass on the green slot

projects.name: Canary Deployer
projects.description: Gradually shifts production traffic to a canary release using configurable weight increments; monitors error rates and auto-promotes or rolls back

entries.description: Initial percentage of traffic routed to the canary slot

projects.name: Release Manager
projects.description: Coordinates release trains across multiple services: schedules release windows, tracks dependencies, and generates release notes from commit history

entries.description: Slack channel webhook for release announcements

projects.name: Secrets Rotator
projects.description: Automates credential rotation for databases, API keys, and certificates on a configurable schedule, coordinating zero-downtime updates via the Secret Manager

entries.description: Default rotation interval in days for secrets without an explicit schedule

projects.name: Compliance Gate
projects.description: Enforces policy-as-code checks during CI/CD pipelines; blocks deployments that fail security, licensing, or change-management policies

entries.description: Policy decision log and exemption registry
Whether failing policy checks block the deployment or only warn

projects.name: Infrastructure Drift Detector
projects.description: Compares live cloud infrastructure state against Terraform or Pulumi state files and reports unauthorised out-of-band changes

entries.description: Cron expression controlling when drift scans run

projects.name: GitOps Controller
projects.description: Synchronises Kubernetes cluster state with Git repository contents using ArgoCD-style reconciliation loops

projects.name: Change Advisory Board
projects.description: Implements digital CAB workflows: change request submission, risk scoring, approval routing, and integration with ServiceNow for ITSM compliance

entries.description: ServiceNow instance URL for ITSM integration

projects.name: CI Runner
projects.description: Self-hosted GitHub Actions runner manager that provisions ephemeral containers on demand and registers them with GitHub for job dispatch

entries.description: Runner registration and job state store
Maximum concurrent CI jobs across all runner instances

projects.name: Database Provisioner
projects.description: Automates database instance provisioning, schema migrations, and access credential management on AWS RDS and Azure SQL

entries.description: AWS RDS subnet group for new database instances

projects.name: Network Manager
projects.description: Manages VPC configurations, security groups, NACLs, and inter-service network policies using Terraform via the infrastructure API

entries.description: Network policy and change log store
Default VPC ID for new infrastructure resources

projects.name: Cloud Resource Manager
projects.description: Unified control plane for provisioning and lifecycle management of AWS and Azure cloud resources, with tagging enforcement and quota tracking

entries.description: Default cloud provider for new resource provisioning requests

projects.name: Cost Optimizer
projects.description: Analyses cloud spending across accounts, identifies over-provisioned resources, recommends rightsizing, and enforces budget alerts

entries.description: Monthly spend threshold in USD that triggers a budget alert

projects.name: Backup Service
projects.description: Schedules and executes database backups, object-store snapshots, and configuration exports; validates restore integrity on a weekly cadence

entries.description: Backup job schedule and manifest store
How long backup files are retained before automatic deletion

projects.name: Disaster Recovery Service
projects.description: Manages DR runbooks, cross-region replication health checks, RTO/RPO tracking, and automated failover orchestration

entries.description: DR plan and failover state store
AWS/Azure region used as the failover target

projects.name: Monitoring Service
projects.description: Collects Prometheus metrics from all services, evaluates alerting rules, and dispatches alerts to PagerDuty, Slack, and email

entries.description: Prometheus remote-write endpoint for metrics ingestion
PagerDuty Events API v2 routing key

projects.name: Alerting Service
projects.description: Manages alert routing rules, escalation policies, on-call schedules, and suppression windows; acts as an intermediary between Monitoring Service and human responders

entries.description: Alert history and on-call roster store
Default alert silence duration when snoozed from the dashboard

projects.name: Autoscaler
projects.description: Implements predictive and reactive horizontal pod autoscaling by consuming Prometheus metrics and issuing scale commands to the Kubernetes API

entries.description: Minimum time between consecutive scale-up or scale-down events per service

projects.name: Capacity Planner
projects.description: Analyses historical resource utilisation trends to generate monthly capacity forecasts and procurement recommendations for the infrastructure team

entries.description: Number of days ahead the capacity forecast covers

projects.name: DNS Manager
projects.description: Manages Route 53 and Azure DNS records programmatically; provides a self-service API for services to register their own DNS entries

entries.description: Default TTL for new DNS records

projects.name: SSL Manager
projects.description: Provisions TLS certificates via Let's Encrypt and AWS ACM, monitors expiration, and automates renewal with zero-downtime rotation

entries.description: Number of days before expiry that certificate renewal is triggered

projects.name: Firewall Manager
projects.description: Manages AWS WAF rule groups, security group rules, and IP allow/block lists across all production accounts via a central policy API

entries.description: Firewall policy and rule audit store
AWS WAF managed rule group ARN for common web threat protection

projects.name: VPN Manager
projects.description: Manages AWS Client VPN and WireGuard VPN configurations, user certificate provisioning, and access log collection for remote-access security

entries.description: CIDR block assigned to VPN clients

projects.name: Storage Manager
projects.description: Abstracts object storage across S3 and Azure Blob; provides a unified API for service teams to create buckets, manage lifecycle rules, and generate pre-signed URLs

entries.description: Default region for new bucket creation requests

projects.name: Resource Tagger
projects.description: Enforces mandatory cloud resource tagging policies by auditing new resources and applying cost-centre, owner, and environment tags automatically

entries.description: Whether to block resource creation that lacks required tags

projects.name: Load Balancer Manager
projects.description: Manages AWS ALB and NLB listener rules, target group registrations, and health check configurations via Terraform provider API

entries.description: Load balancer rule and state store
Default health check path used for new target groups

projects.name: Gateway Core
projects.description: Public-facing API gateway that handles external client authentication, TLS offload, request routing to internal services, and response caching

entries.description: Redis for API key cache and response cache
Maximum request body size in kilobytes

projects.name: Rate Limiter
projects.description: Enforces per-client and per-route rate limits using token-bucket and sliding-window algorithms stored in Redis

entries.description: Default sliding window duration for rate-limit counters

projects.name: API Versioning Service
projects.description: Manages API version lifecycle, negotiates version selection from Accept headers, and routes deprecated versions to shim adapters

entries.description: API version registry and deprecation schedule
Minimum notice period in months before a version is fully retired

projects.name: Request Throttler
projects.description: Applies adaptive request throttling under high load using queue depth and CPU utilisation signals to protect backend services

entries.description: Queue depth that triggers throttling mode

projects.name: Auth Middleware
projects.description: Validates bearer tokens, API keys, and HMAC signatures at the gateway edge before requests are forwarded to internal services

entries.description: Duration to cache validated token claims in Redis

projects.name: Request Validator
projects.description: Enforces OpenAPI-defined request schemas at the gateway; rejects malformed requests before they reach internal services

entries.description: Reject requests with unknown additional properties

projects.name: Response Transformer
projects.description: Applies response transformations including field filtering, format translation (JSON↔XML), and envelope normalisation for legacy API compatibility

entries.description: Maximum response size that transformation rules are applied to

projects.name: API Documentation Service
projects.description: Aggregates OpenAPI specs from all registered services, merges them into a unified portal spec, and serves the Swagger UI and Redoc pages

entries.description: Publicly accessible base URL where the developer portal is served

projects.name: Developer Portal API
projects.description: Backend for the public developer portal; manages API key issuance, usage dashboards, sandbox environments, and developer account management

entries.description: Developer account and API key store
Base URL for the sandbox API environment used by developers

projects.name: Gateway Analytics
projects.description: Captures and aggregates API gateway traffic metrics: request counts, latency percentiles, error rates, and top consumers by client and route

entries.description: ClickHouse for high-volume gateway event ingestion
How often buffered analytics events are flushed to ClickHouse
